name: Top Dollar Pawn - Ledbetter
description_short: Pawn shop in Dallas offering collateral-based loans and purchases of jewelry, electronics, tools, and collectibles. Note: Recent reviews indicate ownership/management change to Cash America with reported service issues.
description_long:
Top Dollar Pawn - Ledbetter is a pawn shop located at 2919 E Ledbetter Drive in Dallas, Texas. The business operates as a traditional collateral-based lending service, accepting items of value in exchange for immediate cash loans or outright purchases.

The shop buys and accepts pawns across a broad range of categories including fine jewelry (diamond rings, necklaces, earrings, bracelets, chains), precious metals (coins), electronics (TVs, home theaters, iPhones, iPads, MacBooks, car audio), tools (Hilti, Makita, Bosch brands), work radios, video game systems and accessories, musical instruments and stage lighting, sporting goods, hunting/fishing/camping equipment, and firearms. They offer pawn loans and a layaway program, accepting cash and debit card payments.

What distinguishes this location is its acceptance of high-end brand tools (professional-grade Hilti, Makita, Bosch equipment) alongside standard pawn shop inventory. The business also operates an online pawn value estimator tool to help customers understand potential loan amounts before visiting. Hours are consistent Monday through Saturday, 10 AM to 5 PM.

However, a critical caveat appears in recent customer reviews. One reviewer from 128 months ago noted that "This location was formerly Top Dollar Pawn Shop. Now it is Cash America. They have HORRIBLE customer service and the staff members have bad attitudes. Avoid this location if possible!!!" This indicates a significant ownership or management transition that may have negatively impacted service quality. Prospective customers should be aware of this documented service concern before visiting.
pros: Accepts wide range of collateral including professional-grade tools (Hilti, Makita, Bosch brands)
Offers both pawn loans and outright purchases for flexibility
Provides free online pawn value estimator before visiting the store
Accepts multiple payment methods including cash and debit cards
Layaway program available for structured purchases
Buys jewelry, electronics, and collectibles with documented pricing estimates
cons: Recent review (128 months ago) reports location changed from Top Dollar Pawn to Cash America with 'HORRIBLE customer service' and staff with 'bad attitudes'
Limited online presence or company website beyond the listing directory
No clear transparency on loan terms, interest rates, or redemption periods
Sunday closure limits weekend accessibility for some consumers
Outdated or conflicting business naming (listed as 'Top Dollar Pawn' but reportedly now 'Cash America')
best_for: Tool professionals and contractors needing quick cash who own high-end equipment
Electronics owners (iPhones, MacBooks, game systems) seeking fast collateral loans
Jewelry sellers wanting immediate payment without consignment delays
Consumers needing emergency cash who prefer collateral-based loans over traditional credit
diagnosis: Best for Dallas-area consumers with high-value collateral (professional tools, electronics, jewelry) who need immediate cash and prefer pawn loans over credit-based alternatives. However, the significant documented service quality decline following the apparent transition to Cash America management requires serious consideration—prospective customers should verify current business operations and service standards before committing.
services: Jewelry and gold buying (diamonds, rings, necklaces, bracelets, chains, coins)
Electronics purchasing (TVs, home theaters, iPhones, iPads, MacBooks, car audio)
Tool buying (Hilti, Makita, Bosch professional equipment)
Video game systems, controllers, and accessories purchasing
Musical instruments and stage lighting buying
Sporting goods, hunting, fishing, and camping equipment purchasing
Debit card and cash payment processing
